calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-04-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Duncan M. McNeil, Atty.for Pltf. Gerald Pacatte

Rolando Ortiz, Regina Chavez, Defendants in Propria Persona

JUDGE PROTEM: Marc Seidenfeld; CLERK: E. Estacio; CSR: Susan Lee (306A)

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. Case settled on the record: Terms as follows:
- Judgment for plaintiff for restitution and possession of premises located at 3767 Cezar Chavez Street, S.F., CA 94110 (aka 3767 Army Street).
- Writ to issue immediately but stayed until 5/3/04 by 5 pm.
- Any personal property left is deemed abandoned and will be disposed off by pltf.
- Lease forfeited.
- If deft. vacates by 5/3/04, back rent will be waived. Pltf. will pay deft $2,400.00 to be
paid to the trust of Mr. McNeil's Trust Account.
- Rent of April 2004 is waived.
- Rent for the first 5 days in May, 2004 is waived.
- Each party to bear own Atty fees and costs.
- Deft claims he is the only tenant in the premises.
- Pltf to prepare written stipulation to be signed by both parties and file to the court.
- See reporter's transcript for further terms and conditions.

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Feb-02-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Rolando Ortiz and Regina Ortiz, (415) 756-6519, Defendants Propria Persona and Moving Party
Duncan Malcolm McNeill, Esq. (650) 994-2295, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Pacatte
RULING:
The Court ordered Kenneth King to be present to give sworn testimony; Kenneth King and Plaintiff Pacatte are not present. DEFENDANT ROLANDO ORTIZ and REGINA CHAVEZ' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is GRANTED. DEFENDANT ROLANDO ORTIZ and REGINA CHAVEZ' MOTION TO STAY OR DISMISS is OFF CALENDAR. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
